description:
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.


See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- fix(view-editor): robustly extract the SELECT body from view definitions by @maacl in #320
- Kubernetes Selection Dialog Improvements by @metalgrid in #319
- Forward external plugin trigger RPCs by @haos666 in #321
- docs(readme): add Flatpak install via Flatpark by @jing2uo in #341
- chore: Add Vercel OSS Program badge to README by @NewtTheWolf in #328
- feat(mcp): add approval attention controls and localized notifications by @Stiwar0098 in #311
- feat(ui): show project social links across update, what's new and welcome modals by @debba in #353
- feat: restore previous session connections and add start-maximized option by @GabrielMalava in #332
- fix: scope ER diagram, dump and export to the selected database on multi-database connections by @debba in #346
- fix(ai): refresh Anthropic and MiniMax models from their APIs by @debba in #359
- Add Gruvbox theme by @Wilovy09 in #357
- Feat/customizable result colors by @GabrielMalava in #354
- Add function to include headers in CSV output by @Wilovy09 in #356
- Add IBM Informix plugin to registry by @danielnuld in #343
- feat(editor): tint tab bar with active connection color by @Davydhh in #333
New Contributors
- @maacl made their first contribution in #320
- @haos666 made their first contribution in #321
- @jing2uo made their first contribution in #341
- @Stiwar0098 made their first contribution in #311
- @GabrielMalava made their first contribution in #332
- @Wilovy09 made their first contribution in #357
- @danielnuld made their first contribution in #343
- @Davydhh made their first contribution in #333
Full Changelog: v0.13.2...v0.13.3
